creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I'm looking for speakers support on a Lenovo Legion 5 Intel (15IMH05) laptop.

 - headphones work ok
 - speakers doesn't produce sound.

A past review D30333 was incorporated into source but it doesn't make it work on this laptop Intel version.

dmesg, sndstat and sysctl hdda logs at https://people.freebsd.org/~eduardo/logs/speakers/

Thanks in advance,

Nuno Teixeira
